# Design System: Clean Shopper
**Version:** 2.0
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-14
**Source:** Generated by /design-system-generator skill — inspired by seed.com visual language

---

## How to Use This Document
This file is referenced by CLAUDE.md and read by Claude Code at the start of every session.
Apply these tokens for all UI work. Do not hardcode hex values, pixel sizes, or spacing
values in components. Reference token names from tailwind.config.js instead.

---

## Brand Direction
Clean Shopper draws visual inspiration from seed.com: premium wellness branding that feels trustworthy, sophisticated, and deeply natural without being clinical. The palette anchors in deep forest green with warm off-white surfaces, creating an unhurried, high-quality feel. Typography is light and elegant — DM Sans at low weights — letting content breathe rather than compete.

---

## Color System

### Primary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| primary | #1c3a13 | Primary buttons, active navigation states, key CTAs, and "clean" rating indicators. Not for decorative fills, large background surfaces, or secondary actions. |
| primary-light | #2e5c20 | Hover states on primary elements, tinted backgrounds behind primary content blocks. Not used as a standalone interactive color. |
| primary-dark | #0f2209 | Pressed/active states on primary buttons, high-contrast text links on light backgrounds. Not for large surface fills. |

### Secondary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| secondary | #eff1e4 | Page-level section fills, card surfaces, areas needing warmth without competing with content. Not for interactive elements or text. |
| secondary-dark | #dde2d0 | Card borders, input backgrounds, subtle section dividers. Not for text or interactive states. |

### Accent Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| accent | #9f995b | Secondary interactive elements, icon highlights, progress indicators, chips. Not for primary CTAs or destructive actions. |
| accent-light | #c4be84 | Accent hover states, tinted icon backgrounds, subtle tag fills. Not used as a standalone interactive color. |

### Semantic Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| success | #16803a | Clean product ratings, confirmed saves, positive state indicators. Not for decorative use or general affirmation. |
| warning | #d97706 | Moderate ingredient concerns, caution ratings, alerts requiring attention but not blocking. Not for errors or destructive actions. |
| error | #eb5757 | Error states, "avoid" ingredient ratings, destructive actions, form validation failures. Not for general alerts or warnings. |

### Neutral Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| neutral-50 | #fcfcf7 | Page background. The base canvas for all layouts. |
| neutral-100 | #eff1e4 | Card backgrounds, elevated surface fills, input field backgrounds. |
| neutral-200 | #dde2d0 | Borders, dividers, table row separators. |
| neutral-400 | #8a9a7c | Placeholder text, disabled element text, inactive icon fills. |
| neutral-600 | #4a5e3c | Secondary body text, metadata, supporting copy, labels. |
| neutral-900 | #1c3a13 | Primary text, headings, high-emphasis labels. Same as primary brand color. Never use pure black (#000000). |

---

## Typography

**Font Family:** DM Sans — a clean, geometric variable sans-serif with excellent support for light weights (300); its neutral, modern character matches seed.com's refined, wellness-adjacent tone without imposing personality on the content.
**Source:** Google Fonts

### Type Scale
| Token Name | Size | Weight | Line Height | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| display | 48px | 300 | 1.2 | Hero headlines, marketing moments, landing page anchors. One per view maximum. |
| h1 | 40px | 300 | 1.25 | Page titles, primary view headings. One per page. |
| h2 | 32px | 300 | 1.3 | Section headers that divide major content areas within a page. |
| h3 | 24px | 400 | 1.35 | Card titles, subsection headers, modal headings. |
| h4 | 20px | 400 | 1.4 | Component labels, small headers, list group titles. |
| body | 16px | 400 | 1.6 | All body copy, product descriptions, ingredient explanations. Default text size. |
| small | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | Supporting text, metadata, tag labels, form helper text. |
| micro | 12px | 400 | 1.4 | Timestamps, legal text, attribution, minimal UI labels. |

---

## Spacing Scale

Base unit: 4px

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| space-3xs | 2px | Minimum padding for tight badges and pills (e.g. SafetyBadge sm vertical padding). |
| space-2xs | 6px | Minimal vertical padding inside compact components (e.g. Button sm size). |
| space-xs | 4px | Icon internal padding, tight inline gaps between adjacent elements. |
| space-sm | 8px | Compact padding within small components (badges, tags, chips). |
| space-md | 16px | Standard internal component padding (buttons, inputs, list items). |
| space-lg | 24px | Card internal padding, section internal spacing, form group gaps. |
| space-xl | 32px | Between distinct components within a section. |
| space-2xl | 48px | Between major sections on a page. |
| space-3xl | 64px | Page-level top/bottom margins, large section gap at breakpoints. |
| space-4xl | 96px | Hero sections, full-bleed spacing, generous top-of-page breathing room. |

### Sizing Tokens

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| icon-sm | 18px | Small inline icon dimensions (e.g. spinner inside Button). |
| touch | 48px | Minimum touch target height. Apply via `min-h-touch` when needed. |
| img-card | 200px | Fixed height for product card image areas. |
| score-badge | 44px | Width and height of the score badge overlay on product cards. |

---

## Border Radius

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| radius-sm | 8px | Badges, ingredient tags, small status chips. |
| radius-md | 16px | Inputs, buttons, small product cards, dropdowns. |
| radius-lg | 24px | Full product cards, modals, sheet overlays, search panels. |
| radius-full | 9999px | Pill buttons, avatar thumbnails, fully rounded toggle elements. |

---

## Shadows

Seed-inspired flat aesthetic — shadows are subtle and tinted with the primary brand color rather than pure black.

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| shadow-sm | 0 1px 2px rgba(28,58,19,0.06) | Resting card state, minimal surface lift. Default for all cards. |
| shadow-md | 0 2px 8px rgba(28,58,19,0.08) | Hover state on cards, dropdown menus, floating elements. |
| shadow-lg | 0 4px 16px rgba(28,58,19,0.10) | Modals, overlays, focused search panels. |

---

## Usage Rules Summary

These rules apply to every component Claude Code builds for this project:

1. Never hardcode a hex value. Use the token name from tailwind.config.js.
2. Never hardcode a pixel font size. Use the type scale token classes.
3. Never hardcode spacing. Use the spacing scale token classes.
4. Primary color is for the single most important interactive element per view — primary buttons and active nav states only. Not for decorative fills or secondary actions.
5. Neutral-900 for primary text. Neutral-600 for secondary text. Never use pure black (#000000).
6. Semantic colors carry meaning. Do not use success green for anything other than positive states. Do not use error red for anything other than errors and destructive actions.
7. Secondary (#eff1e4) is a warm surface color, not an interactive color. Never apply it to buttons, links, or states.
8. Accent (warm olive) is for secondary interactivity only — links, icons, chips. It does not replace primary for CTAs.
9. Heading weights (h1, h2, display) use weight 300 — do not override to heavier weights without explicit design reason.
